title: German Christmas Pudding Bake
description: A traditional German-inspired Christmas pudding baked with love, perfect for the holiday season. This sweet treat combines the flavors of the season in a moist and flavorful dessert.

ingredients.name: Australian Christmas Pudding
ingredients.notes: available in most supermarkets during the holiday season

instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with softened butter.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Australian Christmas Pudding, white sugar, and bake flour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract (if using).
Pour the egg mixture over the pudding mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the edges are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream if desired.
